category_sources: source_facts.description says it builds source and injects it into Docker images; official repository README describes S2I as a toolkit and workflow for reproducible container images from source code.
display_name_sources: Official OpenShift repository README uses the display name "Source-to-Image (S2I)".
docs_sources: The official GitHub README is the primary project documentation surface for openshift/source-to-image.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplies https://github.com/openshift/source-to-image; per instruction, not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description, source_facts.executables, and official README describe source-to-container-image builds, OpenShift use, and the s2i CLI.
